modules.name: Kill Aura
modules.description: Finds and attacks the most relevant entities around you.

modules.name: Aim Assist
modules.description: Nudges your aim toward nearby targets with legit-style corrections.

modules.name: Reach
modules.description: Extends how far you can attack or interact.

modules.name: Block
modules.description: Lets you act while blocking, or blocks for you automatically.

modules.name: Velocity
modules.description: Reduces or cancels the knockback you take when hit.

modules.name: Auto Clicker
modules.description: Clicks for you with human-like patterns.

modules.name: WTap
modules.description: Resets your sprint to land more knockback.

modules.name: Auto Head
modules.description: Eats golden heads automatically.

modules.name: Piercing
modules.description: Lets you hit players through blocks.

modules.name: Attack Delay
modules.description: Removes the delay after a missed attack.

modules.name: Anti Bot
modules.description: Extra bot-detection checks so targeting ignores fake players.

modules.name: Anti Fireball
modules.description: Deflects nearby fireballs automatically.

modules.name: Scaffold
modules.description: Places blocks under you automatically.

modules.name: Timer
modules.description: Changes your game tick speed.

modules.name: Fast Break
modules.description: Breaks blocks faster.

modules.name: Breaker
modules.description: Breaks the right blocks for mini-games.

modules.name: Speed
modules.description: You become a cheetah in real life.

modules.name: Flight
modules.description: You grow wings in real life.

modules.name: No Slow
modules.description: Removes vanilla slowdowns such as item use.

modules.name: Movement Fix
modules.description: Locks your movement to your rotations.

modules.name: Step
modules.description: Steps up blocks taller than vanilla allows.

modules.name: Phase
modules.description: Lets you walk through walls.

modules.name: Target Strafe
modules.description: Circles you around your target.

modules.name: Sprint
modules.description: Changes the logic behind sprinting.

modules.name: Eagle
modules.description: Sneaks at block edges automatically (Ninja Bridge).

modules.name: Inventory Move
modules.description: Lets you move while an inventory is open.

modules.name: Clipper
modules.description: Clips you up or down when the space allows it.

modules.name: Safe Walk
modules.description: Keeps you from walking off the edge of blocks.

modules.name: Long Jump
modules.description: Lets you jump further.

modules.name: Strafe
modules.description: Lets you strafe more.

modules.name: Spider
modules.description: Lets you climb walls.

modules.name: Fast Stop
modules.description: Makes you stop moving faster.

modules.name: Jesus
modules.description: Lets you walk on water.

modules.name: Jump Cooldown
modules.description: Modifies the vanilla jump cooldown.

modules.name: Movement Recorder
modules.description: Records and plays back movement for parkour practice.

modules.name: Disabler
modules.description: Eases up anti-cheat checks.

modules.name: No Fall
modules.description: Removes your fall damage.

modules.name: Auto Tool
modules.description: Switches to the best tool in your hotbar automatically.

modules.name: Auto Armor
modules.description: Equips the best armor you have automatically.

modules.name: Chest Stealer
modules.description: Grabs only the useful or upgraded items from chests.

modules.name: Auto Potion
modules.description: Throws splash potions at your feet for you.

modules.name: Blink
modules.description: Holds your network connection so packets queue up.

modules.name: Anti Void
modules.description: Stops you falling into the void.

modules.name: Auto Hypixel
modules.description: Handy conveniences for Hypixel.

modules.name: Inventory Manager
modules.description: Keeps your inventory tidy.

modules.name: Fast Use
modules.description: Uses items faster.

modules.name: Auto Chest
modules.description: Dumps and pulls resources from chests.

modules.name: No Rotate
modules.description: Stops the server from forcing your rotation.

modules.name: Command Palette
modules.description: Keyboard-first palette for modules, settings, configs, scripts, and language.

modules.name: Spammer
modules.description: Spams the chat.

modules.name: Party Spam
modules.description: Spams a player with party invites.

modules.name: Entity ESP
modules.description: Highlights players and entities through the world.

modules.name: Full Bright
modules.description: Brightens the game so nothing hides in the dark.

modules.name: Click GUI
modules.description: Point-and-click menu for the client's features.

modules.name: Block ESP
modules.description: Highlights containers and resource blocks.

modules.name: Overlay
modules.description: Draws the client's HUD.

modules.name: Item ESP
modules.description: Adds nametags to dropped items.

modules.name: Animations
modules.description: Tweaks in-game animations.

modules.name: No Hurt Camera
modules.description: Stops the camera tilt when you take damage.

modules.name: Cape
modules.description: Gives you a cape of your choosing.

modules.name: Break Progress
modules.description: Shows how far along the block you're breaking is.

modules.name: Tab GUI
modules.description: Keyboard-navigable menu for the client's features.

modules.name: View Clip
modules.description: Lets the third-person camera pass through walls.

modules.name: Streamer Mode
modules.description: Hides sensitive info for content creators.

modules.name: Attack Effects
modules.description: Adds or changes the effects when you hit an entity.

modules.name: Ambience
modules.description: Changes the time of day locally.

modules.name: Hacker Detector
modules.description: Flags players who look like they're cheating.

modules.name: Anti AFK
modules.description: Keeps you from getting kicked for being idle.

modules.name: IRC
modules.description: Chat with other Opal users.

modules.name: Discord RPC
modules.description: Shows rich presence in Discord.
